## Summary

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / adapter / judge / compliance regime
- [ ] Breaking change (public API or behavior)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated; `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] Docs / docstrings updated if public surface changed
- [ ] No new mandatory runtime deps in `kya` core (new deps belong in optional extras)

## Security-sensitive?

- [ ] This PR touches `evidence.py`, `inbound.py`, `_inbound_signing.py`, `tenant_weights.py`, `delegation_policy.py`, or `principals.py`. If checked, re-read [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
